span.p:
Bottom level
n x c = cn

div.style: color: rgb(36, 41, 47) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
(log2 n + 1) levels
each level costs cn
total = cn log2 n + cn
= Theta(n log n)
